_meta.spec: IDTA 02006 Digital Nameplate for Industrial Equipment, Version 3.0.1, October 2025
_meta.source: IDTA-02006-3-0-1_Submodel_Digital-Nameplate.pdf — element tables §3.1–3.5, copied verbatim from the bundled text extraction (IDTA-02006-3-0-1_Submodel_Digital-Nameplate.txt)

schema.primary: the semanticId printed in the table (IEC CDD IRDI, ECLASS pair, or admin-shell.io IRI); 'VERIFY-IN-PDF' where the value is not printed/legible in the extraction
schema.supplemental: the supplementalSemanticId(s) printed in the table — string, array where the PDF prints multiple (AddressInformation), or null where none is printed
schema.modelType: AAS modelType (Property | MultiLanguageProperty | File | SubmodelElementCollection | SubmodelElementList)
schema.legacy20: the IDTA 02006-2-0 (ZVEI-era) semanticId equivalent — INFORMATIVE, sourced from the 2.0 spec which is NOT bundled here; 'VERIFY-IN-2-0-PDF' where not confirmed; null where the element is new in 3.0 / has no 2.0 equivalent
schema.parent: idShort of the containing element ('Nameplate' = submodel root)

warnings: FirmwareVersion.supplemental prints as '0173-1#02AAM985#004' in the PDF text (hyphen after '#02' lost at a line break); normalized to '0173-1#02-AAM985#004'. This IRDI is the subject of 3.0.1 bug fix GitHub issue #123 ('Potentially erroneous ECLASS IRDI for FirmwareVersion').

SoftwareVersion.supplemental prints as '0173-1#02-AAM985#004' — IDENTICAL to FirmwareVersion's. ECLASS AAM985 = 'firmware version', AAM737 = 'software version'; likely residual spec bug. Copied verbatim — VERIFY against the official 3.0.1 template AASX/JSON before wiring into the conformance core.

Street/Zipcode/CityTown/NationalCode are mandatory per §3.2 of the DOCUMENT only; the Address Information drop-in defines all address properties optional and the four are NOT contained in the template AASX (Annex B). Their semanticIds are NOT printed in the 02006 tables (Figure 3 is an image) — they are defined by the SMT drop-in 'Address Information' (IDTA 02002 family), hence 'VERIFY-IN-PDF' with the app's current values recorded in the note.
Known issue (PDF p.20): the official 3.0.1 AASX uses idShorts for SML children ('Markings__00__') and is only valid as of metamodel V3.1 (AASd-120 forbids them under 3.0).
The submodel semanticId is UNCHANGED by 3.0.1 — still https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate (no /3/0/1/ or /3/1/ IRI exists).

URIOfTheProduct.note: valueType was String in 2.0 → AnyUri in 3.0 (Annex B)

AddressInformation.note: renamed from ContactInformation (2.0) to AddressInformation (3.0); defined by SMT drop-in 'Address Information'; the zvei/1/0 primary IRI is CORRECT inside the 3/0 submodel

ManufacturerProductType.note: was MLP (langString) in 2.0 → Property (String) in 3.0 (Annex B)

OrderCodeOfManufacturer.note: cardinality 0..1 in 2.0 → 1 (MANDATORY) in 3.0; was MLP (langString) in 2.0 → Property (String) in 3.0 (Annex B)

ProductArticleNumberOfManufacturer.note: was MLP (langString) in 2.0 → Property (String) in 3.0 (Annex B)

HardwareVersion.note: was MLP (langString) in 2.0 → Property (String) in 3.0 (Annex B)

FirmwareVersion.note: PDF prints '0173-1#02AAM985#004' (hyphen lost at line break) — normalized here; subject of 3.0.1 bug fix #123; was MLP (langString) in 2.0 → Property (String) in 3.0

SoftwareVersion.note: VERBATIM from the 3.0.1 PDF but IDENTICAL to FirmwareVersion's supplemental (ECLASS AAM985 = 'firmware version') — suspicious; VERIFY-IN-PDF / official 3.0.1 AASX before use. Was MLP (langString, AAM737#002) in 2.0 → Property (String) in 3.0

CountryOfOrigin.note: country codes per DIN EN ISO 3166-1 alpha-2

UniqueFacilityIdentifier.note: NEW in 3.0 (added in anticipation of the European ESPR Regulation); no ECLASS supplemental

Markings.note: was SMC in 2.0 → SML in 3.0 (Annex B); orderRelevant=No, typeValueListElement=SubmodelElementCollection (invalid value fixed by 3.0.1 issue #155); CE marking mandatory per EU Blue Guide

Markings__00__.note: '__00__' = decimal-digit uniquifier suffix (Annex A), any unique idShort allowed; was idShort 'Marking' in 2.0; under metamodel 3.0 SML children must not carry idShort (AASd-120) — official AASX valid only as of V3.1

MarkingName.note: prefer a valueId from the IEC CDD/ECLASS enumeration (CE = 0112/2///61987#ABO409#003 or 0173-1#07-DAA603#004); plain string in value is the fallback; do NOT use ECLASS booleans like 'CE-qualification present' (0173-1#02-BAF053#008)

IssueDate.note: lexical format CCYY-MM-DD, to the day

ExpiryDate.note: lexical format CCYY-MM-DD, to the day

MarkingFile.note: conformity symbol of the marking, e.g. /aasx/Nameplate/marking_ce.png

MarkingAdditionalText.note: e.g. ID number of the notified body involved in the conformity process

AssetSpecificProperties.note: no IEC CDD primary — the printed semanticId IS the ECLASS pair

ArbitraryProperty.note: idShort arbitrary; displayName recommended; occurs in both parents with the same semanticId

ArbitraryMLP.note: idShort arbitrary; displayName recommended; occurs in both parents with the same semanticId

ArbitraryFile.note: idShort arbitrary; displayName recommended; occurs in both parents with the same semanticId

GuidelineSpecificProperties.note: NESTED under AssetSpecificProperties — NOT a submodel-root child

GuidelineSpecificProperties__00__.note: the SMC's own semanticId is the ECLASS class IRDI ONLY (no 02-ABI219 prefix) — differs from the containing SML's pair; one SMC per additional standard/directive

GuidelineForConformityDeclaration.note: guideline, stipulation or legislation used for determining conformity

Street.note: mandatory per §3.2 of the 02006 document (drop-in defines it optional; not in the template AASX); semanticId defined by SMT drop-in Address Information / IDTA 02002, not printed in 02006 — app currently uses 0173-1#02-AAO128#002

Zipcode.note: mandatory per §3.2 of the 02006 document (drop-in defines it optional; not in the template AASX); semanticId defined by SMT drop-in Address Information / IDTA 02002, not printed in 02006 — app currently uses 0173-1#02-AAO129#002

CityTown.note: mandatory per §3.2 of the 02006 document (drop-in defines it optional; not in the template AASX); semanticId defined by SMT drop-in Address Information / IDTA 02002, not printed in 02006 — app currently uses 0173-1#02-AAO132#002

NationalCode.note: mandatory per §3.2 of the 02006 document (drop-in defines it optional; not in the template AASX); semanticId defined by SMT drop-in Address Information / IDTA 02002, not printed in 02006 — app currently uses 0173-1#02-AAO134#002
